texto: If we make a full surrender, God will give us something better than we have ever known before. We will get a new vision of Jesus Christ, and will thank God not only in this life but in the life to come. May God help each and every one of us to make a full and complete and unconditional surrender to God, fully and wholly, now and forever.
explicacao: Citação de Dwight L. Moody sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If we make a full surrender, God will give us something better than we have ever known before. We…” articula reflexao, christianity, surrender em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
